description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a thick, rectangular black metal head and a straight, cylindrical wooden handle. The head is solid and blocky, with flat striking faces on both ends, suitable for heavy-duty tasks such as driving stakes or breaking hard materials. The handle is made of light-colored wood, showing a natural grain and a smooth finish, and is securely fitted into the head. The hammer's head appears to be painted or coated in a glossy black finish, contrasting with the matte, natural wood of the handle. There are some visible markings or text on the handle, possibly indicating branding or specifications. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for use in construction, maintenance, or repair work in urban environments.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a glossy black rectangular metal head and a straight, smooth wooden handle, featuring visible markings on the handle.
description_view_0: The hammer is viewed head-on, showing the circular end of the wooden handle and the broad, flat face of the black metal head.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the straight wooden handle and the rectangular shape of the hammer head, with visible markings on the handle.
description_view_2: The opposite end view displays the back of the hammer head and the end of the handle, emphasizing the thickness and solid build of the head.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, but from the opposite side, again showing the handle's length and the rectangular head.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle with a smooth, natural finish and visible grain, no ergonomic or textured grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type head with flat striking faces on both ends, made of black-coated steel
